title: Sukuna Finger Recipes
description: A JujutsuCraft addon that adds recipes that use Sukuna's fingers
body:
A Jujutsucraft Addon that adds recipes involving Sukuna's Fingers

Current recipes are:
- Sukuna Finger -> Mastery of Domain Expansion (v1)
- Mahoraga Body Helmet -> Mahoraga Wheel Helmet (v2)
- Mahoraga Wheel Helmet + Sukuna Finger -> Unlock World Cutting Slash (v2)
